sets.name: IELTS Academic - Core Vocabulary
sets.description: 100 từ học thuật quan trọng nhất cho IELTS Academic

words.meaning: Tỉ mỉ, cẩn thận đến từng chi tiết
words.description: Showing great attention to detail or being very careful and precise
words.exampleSentence: She was meticulous in her research, checking every source twice.
words.collocation: meticulous attention, meticulous planning, meticulous records
words.note: Thường dùng để miêu tả người làm việc cẩn thận

words.meaning: Mơ hồ, có thể hiểu theo nhiều nghĩa
words.description: Having more than one possible meaning; not clear or decided
words.exampleSentence: The instructions were ambiguous, so we were unsure what to do.
words.collocation: ambiguous statement, remain ambiguous, deeply ambiguous
words.note: Danh từ: ambiguity

words.meaning: Đáng kể, lớn, quan trọng
words.description: Large in size, value, or importance
words.exampleSentence: There has been a substantial increase in the number of students.
words.collocation: substantial evidence, substantial amount, substantial progress
words.note: Trái nghĩa: insignificant, negligible

words.meaning: Sau đó, tiếp theo
words.description: Happening after something else; afterwards
words.exampleSentence: He was subsequently promoted to manager.
words.collocation: subsequently discovered, subsequently published
words.note: Formal word, thường dùng trong văn viết học thuật

words.meaning: Chưa từng có tiền lệ, chưa từng xảy ra trước đây
words.description: Never having happened or existed before
words.exampleSentence: The pandemic caused an unprecedented economic crisis.
words.collocation: unprecedented growth, unprecedented scale, unprecedented demand
words.note: Rất phổ biến trong IELTS Writing Task 2

words.meaning: Ủng hộ, bênh vực; người ủng hộ
words.description: To publicly support or recommend a cause or policy (v); a person who supports a cause (n)
words.exampleSentence: She advocates for stricter environmental regulations.
words.collocation: advocate for, strong advocate, advocate change
words.note: Vừa là động từ vừa là danh từ

words.meaning: Mạch lạc, logic, nhất quán
words.description: Logical and consistent; easy to understand
words.exampleSentence: The essay lacks a coherent argument.
words.collocation: coherent argument, coherent plan, coherent strategy
words.note: Danh từ: coherence — quan trọng trong IELTS Writing

words.meaning: Suy giảm, tệ đi, xấu đi
words.description: To become progressively worse
words.exampleSentence: His health began to deteriorate rapidly.
words.collocation: deteriorate rapidly, deteriorate further, continue to deteriorate
words.note: Trái nghĩa: improve, ameliorate

words.meaning: Hàm ý, tác động, hệ quả
words.description: The possible effects or results of an action or decision
words.exampleSentence: We need to consider the implications of this policy.
words.collocation: serious implications, wider implications, have implications for
words.note: Thường dùng số nhiều

words.meaning: Giảm nhẹ, làm dịu bớt
words.description: To make something less harmful, serious, or painful
words.exampleSentence: Steps must be taken to mitigate the effects of climate change.
words.collocation: mitigate risk, mitigate the impact, mitigate damage
words.note: Hay xuất hiện trong IELTS Writing về môi trường

sets.name: Business English - Workplace
sets.description: Từ vựng tiếng Anh thương mại trong môi trường công sở

words.meaning: Sự phối hợp cộng lực, hiệp lực
words.description: The combined effect of two things working together, greater than the sum of their parts
words.exampleSentence: The merger created a synergy between the two companies.
words.collocation: create synergy, synergy between, potential synergy
words.note: Buzzword phổ biến trong môi trường kinh doanh

words.meaning: Tận dụng lợi thế; đòn bẩy
words.description: To use something to maximum advantage; power or ability to influence
words.exampleSentence: We need to leverage our existing customer base.
words.collocation: leverage data, leverage technology, leverage resources
words.note: Rất phổ biến trong văn phong kinh doanh

words.meaning: Chủ động, tiên liệu
words.description: Taking action by causing change rather than reacting to events
words.exampleSentence: We need to be proactive in addressing customer complaints.
words.collocation: proactive approach, proactive measure, be proactive about
words.note: Trái nghĩa: reactive

words.meaning: Đơn giản hóa, tối ưu hóa quy trình
words.description: To make an organization or system more efficient by simplifying procedures
words.exampleSentence: We streamlined the hiring process to reduce time.
words.collocation: streamline operations, streamline process, streamline workflow
words.note: Thường dùng khi nói về cải tiến quy trình

words.meaning: Tiêu chuẩn so sánh, chuẩn mực
words.description: A standard or point of reference used for comparison or measurement
words.exampleSentence: This project will serve as a benchmark for future initiatives.
words.collocation: set a benchmark, industry benchmark, benchmark against
words.note: Cũng dùng như động từ: to benchmark something

words.meaning: Có khả năng mở rộng
words.description: Able to be changed in size or scale; adaptable to growth
words.exampleSentence: We need a scalable solution that can grow with the business.
words.collocation: scalable solution, scalable model, scalable infrastructure
words.note: Rất phổ biến trong lĩnh vực công nghệ và startup

words.meaning: Các bên liên quan, người có lợi ích
words.description: A person with an interest or concern in a business or project
words.exampleSentence: We must consider all stakeholders before making a decision.
words.collocation: key stakeholder, stakeholder engagement, stakeholder management
words.note: Khác với shareholder (cổ đông) — stakeholder rộng hơn

words.meaning: Trách nhiệm giải trình
words.description: The fact of being responsible for your decisions and actions
words.exampleSentence: There must be greater accountability in government spending.
words.collocation: personal accountability, lack of accountability, hold accountable
words.note: Tính từ: accountable. Hay xuất hiện trong IELTS Task 2

sets.name: Everyday English - Conversations
sets.description: Từ vựng giao tiếp hàng ngày

words.meaning: Ngượng ngùng, vụng về, khó xử
words.description: Causing difficulty or embarrassment; not smooth or graceful
words.exampleSentence: There was an awkward silence after his joke.
words.collocation: awkward silence, feel awkward, awkward situation
words.note: Dùng rất nhiều trong hội thoại hàng ngày

words.meaning: Bị áp đảo, quá tải, choáng ngợp
words.description: Having too much to deal with; feeling very strong emotion
words.exampleSentence: I felt overwhelmed by the amount of work.
words.collocation: feel overwhelmed, completely overwhelmed, overwhelmed with work
words.note: Cũng có nghĩa tích cực: overwhelmed with joy

words.meaning: Thật, chân thực, không giả tạo
words.description: Truly what something is said to be; authentic; sincere
words.exampleSentence: She showed genuine concern for her students.
words.collocation: genuine interest, genuine concern, genuine smile
words.note: Trái nghĩa: fake, artificial, insincere

words.meaning: Tự phát, bộc phát, không có kế hoạch
words.description: Done or happening naturally, without planning or thought
words.exampleSentence: We made a spontaneous decision to go on a road trip.
words.collocation: spontaneous decision, spontaneous reaction, spontaneous combustion
words.note: Mang nghĩa tích cực — tự nhiên, không gò bó

words.meaning: Trì hoãn, dây dưa, lần lữa
words.description: To delay doing something that should be done
words.exampleSentence: Stop procrastinating and start working on your assignment.
words.collocation: tend to procrastinate, procrastinate on, stop procrastinating
words.note: Danh từ: procrastination. Rất quen thuộc với sinh viên 😄

words.meaning: Kiên cường, có khả năng phục hồi
words.description: Able to recover quickly from difficult situations
words.exampleSentence: Children are surprisingly resilient in difficult times.
words.collocation: resilient person, remain resilient, highly resilient
words.note: Danh từ: resilience — từ hot trong thời COVID

words.meaning: Sự đồng cảm, thấu cảm
words.description: The ability to understand and share the feelings of another
words.exampleSentence: Good leaders show empathy toward their team members.
words.collocation: show empathy, lack of empathy, empathy for others
words.note: Khác với sympathy: empathy = cảm nhận cùng, sympathy = thông cảm

words.meaning: Mỉa mai, châm biếm
words.description: Using remarks that mean the opposite of what you say, typically to mock
words.exampleSentence: "Oh great, another Monday," he said sarcastically.
words.collocation: sarcastic remark, sarcastic tone, sarcastic comment
words.note: Danh từ: sarcasm. Thường gặp trong phim Mỹ/Anh
